---
name: User Story
about: Describe a need from an end user's perspective to guide implementation
---

## User Story

**As a** [persona — e.g. smart contract developer, security auditor, DevOps engineer]  
**I want** [capability or behavior]  
**so that** [outcome or benefit].

---

### Details (optional)

- **Acceptance criteria:** What would make this "done"? (bullet list)
- **Context:** Repo/contract type, workflow (CLI, web, CI, VS Code), or constraints.
- **Out of scope:** What this story explicitly does not cover (if any).

---

### Example

> **As a** DeFi developer, **I want** to see only new findings compared to my last scan in CI, **so that** I can fix regressions without triaging known issues every run.
